raw_claim: The Bellman operator for a bounded return function with discount factor beta < 1 is a contraction mapping under the supremum norm.
If a continuous function f maps a compact, convex subset of R^n into itself, then f has a fixed point.
A strictly concave, twice continuously differentiable utility function implies a negative semi-definite Hessian matrix.
In a standard Solow-Swan model, if the production function satisfies the Inada conditions, there exists a unique, globally stable steady-state capital-labor ratio.
By the Envelope Theorem, the derivative of the value function with respect to the state variable equals the partial derivative of the objective function evaluated at the optimal policy.
